commands.review_summary:
The PR changes iMessage direct-handle and captioned media sends to use `send-attachment`, then sends captions as a follow-up text message, with focused regression coverage in `extensions/imessage/src/send.test.ts`.

PR surface: Source +38, Tests +121. Total +159 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection of current main shows direct-handle and captioned media can still fall through to the legacy RPC `send` + `file` path, and the existing test documents direct-handle media using that path. I did not run a live Messages reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainers need to require exact-head real behavior proof and choose between this PR and https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/87715; there is no narrow automation repair to queue from this review.
